data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a completion certificate being issued for 80% attendance. While the linked use case indicates that Sarah attended 11 out of 12 sessions, which meets the attendance requirement, there is no evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming that the system correctly tracks attendance per session or issues the certificate based on this tracking. This lack of specific evidence creates a gap in validating the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming attendance tracking per session.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
